spaceConfig.description: Configuration for a space managed by the simplespace implementation. Surfaced via com.atproto.spacehost.getSpace's open config union, and set via createSpace / updateSpace. The two axes are independent: `mintPolicy` decides whether a given user is authorized, and `appAccessMode` + `appExceptions` decide whether a given app is authorized.

mintPolicy.description: How the host decides whether to authorize a credential for a requesting user. 'public' authorizes anyone. 'member-list' consults the host-internal member list (see addMember/removeMember). 'app-callback' asks the configured managingApp at mint time.

managingApp.description: Service identifier (e.g. did:web:example.com#forum) of the application that manages this space. Used to route application-level requests, and as the callback target when mintPolicy is 'app-callback'. Omitted when not configured.

appAccessMode.description: App-level access policy, independent of mintPolicy. 'allow' means any app may sync (with optional denylist via appExceptions), 'deny' means only apps in appExceptions may sync.

appExceptions.description: Apps that break from the default appAccessMode. Functions as denylist when appAccessMode is 'allow', allowlist when appAccessMode is 'deny'.
